caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting with a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall in the background. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Lucid". He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a shock mount. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking into the microphone; his eyes are closed in the initial moments, then he opens them and looks toward the side. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing to form words. He remains stationary in his seat throughout the clip, with his tattooed arm partially visible on the left side of the frame.
